underlying: Noah Kahan, 'The Great Divide' — first-week PURE album sales (Hits Daily Double Top 50, week ending ~May 1, 2026)
resolution_time: 2026-05-01T03:59:00Z (close); ~2026-05-01T14:00:00Z expected expiration when Hits Daily Double posts the week-ending number
method: Normal(mu=152K, sigma=14K) on first-week PURE sales (HDD definition: physical + digital album purchases, EXCLUDING streaming/SEA and track-equivalent/TEA). Anchors: (1) Hits Daily Double tracker projects 275K total first-week consumption units for Noah Kahan's 'The Great Divide' (released Mercury, 4/24/26), with another report at ~335K total. (2) For Kahan-tier streaming-era folk-pop artist, pure typically runs ~50-60% of total album-equivalent units (his 2023 'Stick Season' deluxe re-issue Pure was a smaller fraction of total because catalog already had heavy SEA, but a brand-new flagship release with deluxe boxes/CDs/vinyl at retail typically hits a higher pure share for week 1). (3) Apply mid-range pure-share ~55% of 275K = ~151K; if total is closer to 335K with higher SEA/TEA share due to streaming dominance, pure could land ~160-170K. (4) Kalshi market itself confirms range: 140K bid 0.93 / 150K bid 0.71 ask 0.75 / 160K ask 0.10-0.19 / 170K ask 0.07. That market-implied median is ~152-155K with sigma roughly 8-12K. (5) I widen sigma slightly (14K) given inherent reporting volatility and possible upside from physical-format bundling (vinyl variants, signed CDs) which Kahan has used aggressively. Mean nudged to 152K to align with implied median rather than chase upside tails.
notes: Resolves on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 chart number for the week immediately following wide release (released 4/24/26 → tracking week 4/24-4/30 → posts ~4/30-5/1 evening). Probabilities computed from N(152K, 14K) survival function. Critical caveats: (a) HDD's 'pure album sales' is well-defined = physical + digital album purchases only, no streaming-equivalents — so the 275-335K HEADLINE projection is total consumption units, NOT pure. (b) Pure share for new flagship drop with heavy physical SKU push typically 50-60%. (c) Market is itself mature liquid (40K+ contracts at 120K, 16K+ at 130K) — my mean lines up with market median. (d) Right-tail risk if Kahan moves a heroic vinyl/box-set bundle wave (low-prob but >170K possible). Lowest 11 strikes (10K-110K) are essentially certain Yes (>99.5% clipped to 0.995). The action is between 130K and 170K.
